title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Cars24 - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Join the Cars24 family as a Senior Software Engineer in Pimpri-Chinchwad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
